certificate.description: The module is an encrypted portable storage device, featuring three crypto processors, which provide layers of cryptographic protection. It requires no additional software or drivers to be installed on the host PC. The module is intended for use by US Federal agencies or other markets that require FIPS 140-3 validated encrypted storage.
